nodes.label: AI for content creation and scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: I mostly use AI for content creation for my company's website and social media accounts

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: The AI tends to get overly repetitive... Sometimes it gets information wrong, particularly regarding dates

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I have used AI to brainstorm marketing ideas

nodes.label: Human oversight and editing of AI output
nodes.grounding_span: I then copy and past the generated content, proofread and edit

nodes.label: AI for task organization and planning
nodes.grounding_span: I also will use AI to help organize the tasks I have each week

nodes.label: AI understanding of context and tone
nodes.grounding_span: It will also sometimes over-emphasize a point... where it doesn't quite fit

nodes.label: AI memory and temporal awareness
nodes.grounding_span: Provided it gets better at 'remembering' information and understanding time

nodes.label: AI adoption by less tech-savvy users
nodes.grounding_span: He is less tech savvy than I am and doesn't understand AI as well but it seems to work well enough for him

nodes.label: AI for tasks I can already do myself
nodes.label_negative: AI for tasks I don't understand
nodes.grounding_span: I also don't like to have AI take over any jobs/tasks that I don't thoroughly understand and can't already do myself

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I will write shorter pieces of copy on my own just because it's faster than writing out a prompt

nodes.label: Quality and accuracy of output
nodes.grounding_span: The copy that was being generated wasn't usable which was of course frustrating

nodes.label: Creative control and strategic decision-making
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like the management level tasks are things I should continue to do independently

nodes.label: Understanding and competence
nodes.grounding_span: I also don't like to have AI take over any jobs/tasks that I don't thoroughly understand and can't already do myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for content creation
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like writing copy and don't mind having the AI take over that part of the job

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors and confusion
nodes.grounding_span: The copy that was being generated wasn't usable which was of course frustrating

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI planning capabilities
nodes.grounding_span: Provided it gets better at 'remembering' information and understanding time I would love to use it more

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for management-level tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't want to give that task over entirely to AI. I feel like the management level tasks are things I should continue to do independently

nodes.label: Systematic upfront information provision
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to give it all the information up front

nodes.label: Problem-solving through meta-prompting
nodes.grounding_span: I had the AI write a prompt for me to use to start a new conversation
